description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular, fenced lot featuring a manicured lawn, paved driveway, and a backyard with a swimming pool and patio area. The main structure is a single-story house with a gabled roof, multiple large windows, and a prominent front entrance. The backyard includes a pool with a circular hot tub, surrounded by a paved terrace and outdoor seating area. Mature trees and hedges provide privacy along the rear and side boundaries, while a detached pergola or gazebo structure is visible in one corner. The property is bordered by a dark fence, and the landscaping is neatly maintained with shrubs and small trees lining the perimeter. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and open space.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gabled roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, patio, and pergola. The property is enclosed by a dark fence and surrounded by manicured greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical facade with large windows and a gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and the length of the house with visible windows and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, hot tub, patio, and dense greenery providing privacy at the back of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pergola/gazebo, patio, and the side elevation of the bungalow with arched windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
